statement.en: Regulatory Landslide Hazard Zoning in New Caledonia: Integrating Temporal Probability in a Quantitative Framework

proposer: Yannick Thiéry, Bastien Colas, Mathieu Mengin et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint dated 2026-04-25 (future date, likely submitted work) describing a quantitative regulatory framework integrating temporal probability into landslide hazard zoning. The core proposition—that temporal probability can be systematically integrated into regulatory zoning—is empirically testable but not yet peer-reviewed or validated. The framework itself appears sound in principle but requires field validation, regulatory adoption testing, and temporal verification. Status: provisional pending publication and implementation feedback.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 時間とともに山肌の記憶が薄れ、次なる崩壊の影が近づく。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 時の矢が刻む傾斜の中で、静寂と破局が交互に踊る。
